text.message: I’m one of the last literally
Look at black how much he gain
Oh best OWS “I’m one of the last”
That was revenge, u started play against me from the start red
Can you guys help me settle on the 6 wood or else black will and it will be hbd
4 and 11 never roll so I’m cooked either way
Well do you not see my position lol
We are last, me and you, don’t you see
It’s not about positions, look at the dice
Was banking the 4 and 11 would roll but Janet rolled all game
Get me out of this it’s embarrassing
Now u agree I’m one of the last?
But it doesn’t makes me first or second
Only one not in it is me
Both of us in need of four and it’s never goes
Cried a lot on your way there
